Cell.Data: 详情-客户画像-业务规模
详情-客户画像-中国采购记录
详情-客户画像-公司类型
详情-客户画像-现有设备/车队
详情-客户画像-采购渠道
Customer is inquiring about 30 units of 20HP tractors for delivery to Abuja, Nigeria, representing a business purchase under the company Excellent Great Agricultural Machine.

Customer is interested in purchasing 12 units of 180HP 4WD tractors for Nigeria and also wants to become a distributor. They are frustrated with AI responses and want to disconnect. Routing to human sales team is appropriate.
Customer is inquiring about 7 units of 25HP 4WD tractors for Nigeria on FOB terms. Sent '640' which is unclear — possibly a typo, company code, or HP clarification needed.

Mohamed Ame is an individual dealer in Tanzania looking to import 5 units of 25HP 2WD tractors from China for resale to local farmers. No prior China procurement experience. Interested in CIF Dar es Salaam pricing. Requested product samples/catalogue.
Individual dealer reselling to local farmers
Customer from Ghana inquiring about 5 units of 4WD medium tractor with cabin and AC for Stephen Enterprise. FOB terms confirmed. Has prior China procurement experience.
Has imported from China before, details unknown

Customer from Nigeria is inquiring about tractors (50HP and 75HP) with attachments for a personal project. Quantity appears to be 5 units each. Not a personal consumer - this is a business/commercial purchase of agricultural machinery.

Customer from Nigeria is inquiring about tractors (50HP and 75HP) with attachments for a personal project. Quantity appears to be 5 units each. Not a personal consumer - this is a business/commercial purchase of agricultural machinery.

Customer is a civil contractor from Ghana looking to purchase 4 units of small scale cassava peeling machines for business purposes. No prior China import experience. Currently waiting for product images before proceeding with formal RFQ.
Customer is looking to purchase 4 units of 25HP 2WD tractors for personal farm use in Tanzania, CIF Dar es Salaam. End user inquiry with clear RFQ details collected.
Customer is a distributor in Kenya looking to buy 3 units of 4+ row planters for maize and beans for redistribution/distribution purposes.
Customer Success from Watermelon Farm in Akwa Ibom, Nigeria is inquiring about 2 units of 2-row maize precision seeder on CIF terms. Small end-user order but legitimate business inquiry.
Customer is an individual farmer in Tanzania looking to purchase 2x 60HP 2WD tractors with 1.8m rotavators. No prior China import experience. Small-scale end user purchase.
Customer is an individual farmer in Tanzania looking to purchase 2x 60HP 2WD tractors with 1.8m rotavators. No prior China import experience. Small-scale end user purchase.

Customer from Zambia inquiring about 800 units of 220HP 4WD tractors for their farm/company Kick Save. Large order for delivery to Ndola and Lusaka ports. Customer is frustrated waiting for product photos and is at risk of leaving the conversation.
Has imported before (mentioned yes to China imports)
Customer is a trading company from Ghana seeking 50 cabin tractors (20x 90HP, 30x 120HP) for import, requesting both FOB and CIF pricing to Tema port. First-time importer from China.

Farm owner from Abom, Ghana, inquiring about 23 units of multi-row cocoa planter for DDP delivery to Ashanti Region. Customer is an end user with a 12-hectare cocoa farm. Ready for quotation and asking about payment terms.
Customer is a trading company from Ghana seeking 50 cabin tractors (20x 90HP, 30x 120HP) for import, requesting both FOB and CIF pricing to Tema port. First-time importer from China.

Customer is an individual farm owner in Ghana looking to import 20 engine-powered knapsack sprayers for cocoa farming. First-time importer from China. No company, self-employed. Full RFQ details collected and confirmed.
3-row, suitable for maize, groundnut, soybean, tractor-mounted

Customer is a first-time importer in Ghana, self-employed, inquiring about 3-row multi-crop planters for maize, groundnut, and soybean. Intends to use some units personally and resell others, effectively acting as a small dealer. RFQ is complete with quantity, destination, and trade terms confirmed.
Self-employed, new in business, part personal use and part resale
3-row, suitable for maize, groundnut, soybean, tractor-mounted
Obed from OB Agriculture Ltd, Ghana is sourcing agricultural machinery (tractors and harvesters) for a customer. First-time China importer placing a multi-unit order — clear business/dealer intent.

Customer Faruk from Ghana is a new entrepreneur starting a tractor dealership business, planning to sell to local farmers. He has no existing company yet but has clear intent to purchase 10 units of 90HP 4WD tractors for resale. No prior China import experience.
New starter, plans to sell to farmers in Ghana
Obed from OB Agriculture Ltd, Ghana is sourcing agricultural machinery (tractors and harvesters) for a customer. First-time China importer placing a multi-unit order — clear business/dealer intent.
2-4 row, for maize and mixed crops

Customer is an individual farmer under OKORE Business in Tanzania, seeking 4 tractors and 4 planters for 13 hectares of maize farming. No prior China procurement experience. Awaiting photos and CIF quotation urgently.
2-4 row, for maize and mixed crops

Customer is an individual farmer under OKORE Business in Tanzania, seeking 4 tractors and 4 planters for 13 hectares of maize farming. No prior China procurement experience. Awaiting photos and CIF quotation urgently.

Customer from Nigeria inquiring about agricultural machinery for their farm business. Requested quotation for tractors, rice and corn harvesters, and planters for Lagos port. Experienced China importer (non-agri goods). Company: ADS Global Merchants Ltd.
Farm business based in Kano, Nigeria
Has imported from China before but not farming equipment, other types of goods

Customer from Nigeria inquiring about agricultural machinery for their farm business. Requested quotation for tractors, rice and corn harvesters, and planters for Lagos port. Experienced China importer (non-agri goods). Company: ADS Global Merchants Ltd.
Farm business based in Kano, Nigeria
Has imported from China before but not farming equipment, other types of goods
Obed from OB Agriculture Ltd, Ghana is sourcing agricultural machinery (tractors and harvesters) for a customer. First-time China importer placing a multi-unit order — clear business/dealer intent.
Customer from Eagles Agriculture in Kenya is inquiring about 2 units of 4WD tractors (160-220HP) with cabin and AC, FOB Mombasa. Ready for quotation and photos.

Customer from Nigeria inquiring about agricultural machinery for their farm business. Requested quotation for tractors, rice and corn harvesters, and planters for Lagos port. Experienced China importer (non-agri goods). Company: ADS Global Merchants Ltd.
Farm business based in Kano, Nigeria
Has imported from China before but not farming equipment, other types of goods

Customer from Nigeria inquiring about agricultural machinery for their farm business. Requested quotation for tractors, rice and corn harvesters, and planters for Lagos port. Experienced China importer (non-agri goods). Company: ADS Global Merchants Ltd.
Farm business based in Kano, Nigeria
Has imported from China before but not farming equipment, other types of goods

Customer started as a personal farmer inquiry for 1 tractor for personal use in Ghana. However, scale of operation (500 hectares, groundnut/maize/rice, potential hire-out services) indicates significant business potential. First-time China importer, no registered business yet. Qualifies as serious end-user buyer with PROOF level details collected.
500 hectare farm in Ghana, grows groundnut, maize and rice, 1-2 seasons per year, plans to offer tractor hire services
Previously hired tractors, now looking to own

Customer is a dealer based in Nairobi, Kenya inquiring about 2 units of Zoomlion 90HP 4WD tractors with cabin and AC, CIF Mombasa. Has some China procurement/repair experience and is open to direct import.
~2 years experience with Chinese machinery, involved in repairs including oil pumps
Customer is inquiring about body parts for Toyota Yaris 2010 - headlight, bumper, and taillight, 10 pcs each. Destination and company details still needed.
Customer is inquiring about body parts for Toyota Yaris 2010 - headlight, bumper, and taillight, 10 pcs each. Destination and company details still needed.
Customer is inquiring about body parts for Toyota Yaris 2010 - headlight, bumper, and taillight, 10 pcs each. Destination and company details still needed.

Customer identified as a self-employed mechanic looking for 10 units of 2018 Toyota RAV4 complete engine to Nigeria. Despite the quantity of 10, the customer explicitly stated personal/self-employed mechanic use, indicating a personal consumer rather than a business buyer.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about 8 Toyota engine assemblies (2AZ, 1NZ, 2NZ, 1SZ, 2SZ, 1KR, 3S, 2ZR), 3-5 units each. Destination and company name still needed.
Customer is inquiring about a steering rack for a 2014 Subaru XV to be shipped to Kenya. Quantity is 2 pieces. No OEM code or company name provided yet.

Customer is a business buyer in Nairobi, Kenya looking to sample 15 parts for a Toyota Vitz 2006 before placing larger orders. Has a shipping agent in China, prefers EXW. Clear business intent with potential for repeat orders.

Customer is a business buyer in Nairobi, Kenya looking to sample 15 parts for a Toyota Vitz 2006 before placing larger orders. Has a shipping agent in China, prefers EXW. Clear business intent with potential for repeat orders.
Customer explicitly stated the order is for their personal car. Quantity of 2 pieces and personal use declaration confirms this is a personal consumer, not a business buyer.

Customer is inquiring about bulk auto parts for Tanzania - complete body kits for Land Cruiser and Prado variants, plus complete engines (1HZ/1VD/1KD/2GD). Order quantity of 1000 units indicates a serious B2B wholesale buyer. Requesting samples before full order.

Customer is inquiring about bulk auto parts for Tanzania - complete body kits for Land Cruiser and Prado variants, plus complete engines (1HZ/1VD/1KD/2GD). Order quantity of 1000 units indicates a serious B2B wholesale buyer. Requesting samples before full order.

Customer is inquiring about bulk auto parts for Tanzania - complete body kits for Land Cruiser and Prado variants, plus complete engines (1HZ/1VD/1KD/2GD). Order quantity of 1000 units indicates a serious B2B wholesale buyer. Requesting samples before full order.

B2B buyer from Nigeria inquiring about 50pcs mixed steering pumps for Toyota 1MZ and Nissan VQ engines. Company identified as Old Motor Spare Parts Mgbka. Prefers CIF pricing. Ready for sales handoff.

Customer is a self-employed individual opening a new auto parts shop in Ghana, inquiring for 2010 Toyota Yaris suspension and chassis parts in bulk (50pcs each). Clear business intent despite no formal company name.

Customer is a self-employed individual opening a new auto parts shop in Ghana, inquiring for 2010 Toyota Yaris suspension and chassis parts in bulk (50pcs each). Clear business intent despite no formal company name.

Customer is a self-employed individual opening a new auto parts shop in Ghana, inquiring for 2010 Toyota Yaris suspension and chassis parts in bulk (50pcs each). Clear business intent despite no formal company name.

Customer is a self-employed individual opening a new auto parts shop in Ghana, inquiring for 2010 Toyota Yaris suspension and chassis parts in bulk (50pcs each). Clear business intent despite no formal company name.

Samuel is a new business owner in Nakuru, Kenya, starting an auto parts business. He inquired about brake pads for multiple Toyota and Mazda models from 2010, confirmed 50 sets for Toyota Probox on CIF terms to Kenya.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.

Customer from King Owuza Ventures (Ghana) is inquiring about Honda body parts (bumper, fender, door panel) for Civic, Accord and CR-V (2020-2024), 50pcs each. Clear B2B wholesale inquiry for export to Ghana.
Customer is a business buyer from Kenya (Tseku General Traders) inquiring about Toyota Mark X 2015 head lights, 20pcs, via consolidation shipment. Ready for sales handoff.

Customer initially inquired about a dashboard for personal use (1pc for their car), but later confirmed interest in wholesale pricing and provided company name AG Logistics and Transport Services. Final order is 10pcs, CIF to Ghana, LHD spec.

Customer is inquiring about silver roof rail racks for Toyota Highlander Kluger 2014-2019, 10 sets, shipping to Nigeria. Company: Imperial Konect. Trade term undecided between CIF and EXW. Ready for sales handoff.
B2B customer from Nigeria (Emmywise) inquiring about steering pumps for 4 Japanese car models. Clear business intent with quantity and destination confirmed.
B2B customer from Nigeria (Emmywise) inquiring about steering pumps for 4 Japanese car models. Clear business intent with quantity and destination confirmed.
B2B customer from Nigeria (Emmywise) inquiring about steering pumps for 4 Japanese car models. Clear business intent with quantity and destination confirmed.
B2B customer from Nigeria (Emmywise) inquiring about steering pumps for 4 Japanese car models. Clear business intent with quantity and destination confirmed.

Customer is a business buyer from Nigeria requesting bulk bumper parts for 5 Toyota models. Confirmed name (Mr Christian Iroegbulam), destination (Nigeria), quantities (10 sets each), and wants RMB pricing with both FOB and CIF terms.

Customer is a business buyer from Nigeria requesting bulk bumper parts for 5 Toyota models. Confirmed name (Mr Christian Iroegbulam), destination (Nigeria), quantities (10 sets each), and wants RMB pricing with both FOB and CIF terms.

Customer is a business buyer from Nigeria requesting bulk bumper parts for 5 Toyota models. Confirmed name (Mr Christian Iroegbulam), destination (Nigeria), quantities (10 sets each), and wants RMB pricing with both FOB and CIF terms.

Customer is a business buyer from Nigeria requesting bulk bumper parts for 5 Toyota models. Confirmed name (Mr Christian Iroegbulam), destination (Nigeria), quantities (10 sets each), and wants RMB pricing with both FOB and CIF terms.

Customer is a business buyer from Nigeria requesting bulk bumper parts for 5 Toyota models. Confirmed name (Mr Christian Iroegbulam), destination (Nigeria), quantities (10 sets each), and wants RMB pricing with both FOB and CIF terms.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Customer from PAPA USED SPARE PARTS in Tanzania is inquiring about Toyota steering racks for 7 models (Corolla, Carina, Noah, Hiace, Spacio, Premio, Wish), 5 pcs each, year 2000, FOB shipping.
Business customer from Ghana Initiative Mobile Medical Mission requesting multiple parts for a 2008 Toyota Yaris Verso. Clear B2B inquiry with company name, destination, and CIF trade term confirmed.
Customer from Juamia Company in Ghana inquiring about wheel caps for Hyundai i10 2012 and Diamond T 2012, 4 pieces each, CIF to Ghana. All key RFQ details collected and confirmed.
Customer from Juamia Company in Ghana inquiring about wheel caps for Hyundai i10 2012 and Diamond T 2012, 4 pieces each, CIF to Ghana. All key RFQ details collected and confirmed.
Customer from Auto Work (Tanzania) sent a parts list image requesting a quote for Toyota Land Cruiser L79 2010 body and electrical parts for export to Dar es Salaam on FOB terms.

Customer is inquiring about ignition coil for Toyota Corolla Sports 2015, qty 4 pcs, FOB Nigeria. Identified as individual trader (not a registered company). Small quantity but clear RFQ details provided.

Customer is inquiring about Toyota Harrier body accessories (side mirrors, corner mirrors, rain visors) for export to Tanzania. Despite saying 'personal', the 4-set quantity and export destination suggest dealer/reseller activity. Classified as business inquiry.

Customer is inquiring about Toyota Harrier body accessories (side mirrors, corner mirrors, rain visors) for export to Tanzania. Despite saying 'personal', the 4-set quantity and export destination suggest dealer/reseller activity. Classified as business inquiry.

Customer is inquiring about Toyota Harrier body accessories (side mirrors, corner mirrors, rain visors) for export to Tanzania. Despite saying 'personal', the 4-set quantity and export destination suggest dealer/reseller activity. Classified as business inquiry.
Business customer from Ghana Initiative Mobile Medical Mission requesting multiple parts for a 2008 Toyota Yaris Verso. Clear B2B inquiry with company name, destination, and CIF trade term confirmed.
Customer is making a business inquiry for Toyota Vitz 2010 Gearbox, quantity 3 units, destination Ghana. Intent is clear business purchase, though quantity is small.
Business customer from Ghana Initiative Mobile Medical Mission requesting multiple parts for a 2008 Toyota Yaris Verso. Clear B2B inquiry with company name, destination, and CIF trade term confirmed.
Business customer from Ghana Initiative Mobile Medical Mission requesting multiple parts for a 2008 Toyota Yaris Verso. Clear B2B inquiry with company name, destination, and CIF trade term confirmed.
Customer from Excelsam (Nigeria) is inquiring about a fuel injector for a 2006 Mazda 6 V6, quantity 2 pieces, FOB term. Clear B2B purchase intent with company name and destination confirmed.
Customer from Auto Work (Tanzania) sent a parts list image requesting a quote for Toyota Land Cruiser L79 2010 body and electrical parts for export to Dar es Salaam on FOB terms.
Customer from Auto Work (Tanzania) sent a parts list image requesting a quote for Toyota Land Cruiser L79 2010 body and electrical parts for export to Dar es Salaam on FOB terms.

Customer made a direct parts inquiry for a specific vehicle with registration card proof. Likely individual or small garage owner ordering for own vehicle, but treated as business inquiry per protocol. Quantity is small (2 pcs) but full details provided.

Customer is a business buyer in Nigeria with a fleet of Toyota vehicles. Main inquiry is for Toyota Sienna 2004-2010 engines, container load quantity. Also mentioned interest in Hilux, Corolla, Camry parts and electrical items but Sienna engine is the confirmed priority.
发动机背负式20升喷雾机
100马力四驱带驾驶室空调拖拉机
60-90马力四驱带驾驶室空调拖拉机
